basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MSS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Junior Grade of MSS posts! Published on 22 April 2026 at Mizoram PSC Official Website, this new recruitment drive offers 11 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group as per official notification and possessing not less than 5 years of regular service in the grade of Assistant can apply online up to 25 May 2026. Find all details about the MPSC Junior Grade of MSS new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Not less than 5 years regular service in the grade of Assistant.
qualification.details: Not less than 5 years regular service in the grade of Assistant.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MSS Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MSS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MSS recruitment is 25-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Grade of MSS post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for the Junior Grade of MSS post in the Mizoram PSC recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is not less than 5 years of regular service in the grade of Assistant.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Grade of MSS position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be placed at Level 10 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a Limited Departmental Examination.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for PwBD candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section of this article or on the official Mizoram PSC website.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications must be submitted online only through the official website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Mizoram PSC?
faq.answer: The official website of Mizoram Public Service Commission is https://mpsconline.mizoram.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is LDE (Gazetted Post) No. 13 of 2026-2027.
